service.name: Freshdesk API
service.description_for_ai: Customer support helpdesk. Tickets, agents, contacts, knowledge base, reports. Free plan available. Used by 68K+ companies. Alternative to Zendesk. Use for customer support management, ticket automation.

auth.note: API key as username, X as password

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new customer support ticket in Freshdesk with priority, type, tags, and optional custom fields.

description.description: Detailed description of the issue (HTML supported)

email.description: Customer email address (creates contact if doesn't exist)

type.description: Ticket type: Question, Incident, Problem, Feature Request, Refund

tags.description: Array of tag strings for categorization

responder_id.description: Agent ID to assign ticket to

group_id.description: Support group ID to assign to

cc_emails.description: List of email addresses to CC on ticket

capabilities.description_for_ai: List support tickets with filters. Use for queue management, SLA monitoring, reporting.

filter.description: Named filter: new_and_my_open, watching, spam, deleted. Default is all open tickets.

updated_since.description: ISO 8601 date — return tickets updated after this date

order_by.description: created_at, updated_at, due_by, priority. Default created_at.

agent_hints.auth: API key as username in HTTP Basic auth, any string as password. Get key: Profile Settings → Your API Key
agent_hints.domain: Replace {domain} with your Freshdesk subdomain e.g. mycompany.freshdesk.com
agent_hints.free_plan: Free plan: up to 10 agents. All standard API endpoints available on free plan.
agent_hints.search: Use GET /api/v2/search/tickets?query='status:2 AND priority:3' for complex filtering with Freshdesk Query Language.
